overall.description: A smooth camera walkthrough of a luxury futuristic penthouse in Cyberpunk 2077, starting from an outdoor terrace with sculptural trees, moving through a covered lounge with a central fire pit, and ending with panoramic views of Night City through floor-to-ceiling glass walls.

agents.ego_description: walking from the sunny terrace toward the penthouse interior entrance

sculptural pine tree in rectangular white gravel planter
rectangular ground planter filled with white gravel
dark modern building facade with red accent lighting and glass walls
futuristic cyberpunk cityscape with tall skyscrapers in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny luxury terrace with two sculptural pine trees in white gravel planters. The camera walks forward toward the modern penthouse entrance, with the Night City skyline visible in the background. At around 8 seconds, the scene transitions from bright sunlight into the shaded interior lounge.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered lounge with central fire pit and red neon accent lighting

events.description: camera begins circling around the central fire pit structure
moving deeper into the shaded area, fire pit glow becomes more prominent against the dark interior

agents.ego_description: circling around the central fire pit, examining the modern lounge seating and ambient lighting

entered.detail: square modern fire pit with active flames surrounded by black seating
low-profile modern black sofas surrounding the fire pit
red LED accent lighting strips embedded along the floor edges
transparent glass safety barrier overlooking the city below

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the covered lounge area, circling a central modern fire pit surrounded by black low-profile seating. Red neon accent lighting runs along the floor edges. The space is sheltered with a high ceiling, and the Night City skyline remains visible through the glass railing to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: glass-walled observation deck overlooking cyberpunk cityscape

events.description: focus shifts from interior lounge elements to exterior cityscape and highway view

agents.ego_description: walking along the glass wall while looking out at the futuristic cityscape and elevated highway below

entered.detail: raised highway with moving traffic visible below the penthouse
palm trees visible on lower terraces outside the glass wall
structural support column of the building interior

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the glass railing, revealing a sweeping view of Night City. An elevated highway with sparse traffic runs below, surrounded by futuristic skyscrapers and palm trees. The interior fire pit and seating fade from view as the focus shifts entirely to the panoramic urban landscape outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open-air terrace into a moody interior lounge that eventually reveals a panoramic urban vista. It begins on a sunny luxury terrace featuring sculptural pine trees in white gravel planters, moving forward toward the penthouse entrance with the distant skyline framing the view. As the camera crosses the threshold, the bright sunlight gives way to the shaded interior of a covered lounge, circling a modern fire pit and black low-profile seating accented by red neon floor lighting. The scene then shifts toward the glass railing, where the interior elements fade from view as the perspective opens up to the city. Finally, the focus expands entirely to a sweeping view of Night City, overlooking an elevated highway and futuristic skyscrapers interspersed with palm trees.
